outreach_subject: A European angle on your Regulators may seek to suspend State Farm's license, citing  piece

replies.subject: Re: A European angle on your Regulators may seek to suspend State Farm's license, citing piece
replies.body:
Hi Lisa. Did you try our housing reporter Jack Flemming?

Laurence Darmiento
Staff writer,
Business
Los Angeles Times
Mobile: 818.903.8135



On Mon, May 25, 2026 at 12:56 PM Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> wrote:

> Hi Laurence,
>
> Your piece on State Farm's claims handling really struck a chord. The
> gap between what insurers promise and what they deliver during
> disasters reveals so much about how we think about resilience in
> Southern California.
>
> My Villa builds single-family homes in LA using Italian reinforced
> concrete construction — cemento a vista — the same material that's
> helped Mediterranean communities withstand fires, earthquakes, and
> floods for generations. We're working to bring that level of built-in
> resilience here, where climate risk is rewriting the rules for
> homeowners.
>
> Would you be open to receiving a bit more background on the approach,
> or perhaps a brief call with Paolo, our founder? No pressure either
> way.
>
> Best,
> Lisa Monelli
> My Villa Media Team
> info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
>
replies.snippet: Hi Lisa. Did you try our housing reporter Jack Flemming? Laurence Darmiento Staff writer, Business Los Angeles Times Mobile: 818.903.8135 On Mon, May 25, 2026 at 12:56 PM Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.
